name: Arpit Dwivedi

experience.description: Leading full-stack development and AI integration. Architecting scalable API solutions and managing a team of developers.
Focused on Angular specialization, UI/UX improvements, and robust testing using Jest and TDD principles.
Delivered high-quality client projects, focusing on static websites and responsive design.

hero.title: Full-Stack

about.label: Engineering Mindset
about.title: About
paragraphs: I am a Experience Full-Stack Developer building scalable systems and AI-powered solutions. My approach combines deep technical expertise with a product-focused mindset.

I specialize in the MEAN Stack, architecting distributed systems that handle complex data workflows. From optimizing PDF processing for healthcare to building enterprise-grade HRMS systems, I thrive on solving high-stakes engineering challenges.
My leadership experience in Agile teams allows me to bridge the gap between technical architecture and business impact, ensuring every line of code delivers real value.
